channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pittsburgh Hosts NFL Draft for First Time in Nearly 80 Years
item.description: The Pennsylvania city is welcoming the NFL Draft for the first time since the 1940s, with residents citing the city's dedicated fan culture and championship history as fitting credentials.

item.title: Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Extended Three Weeks; Trump Loosens Medical Marijuana Rules
item.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a three-week extension of their ceasefire, while separately the Trump administration announced changes to federal medical marijuana regulations.

item.title: Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Extended Amid Renewed Exchanges of Fire and Hormuz Tensions
item.description: Despite a three-week ceasefire extension, Hezbollah and Israel resumed hostilities within hours of the announcement, raising doubts about the agreement's durability.

item.title: U.S. Blockade Leaves Thousands of Sailors Stranded as Global Trade Feels the Impact
item.description: An ongoing U.S. blockade on Iranian ports has left thousands of sailors aboard vessels unable to proceed, with economic ripple effects spreading across international shipping markets.

item.title: Robots That Learn Complex Tasks by Observing Humans Raise New Questions
item.description: Scientists report a breakthrough allowing robots to independently learn complex tasks through human observation, though experts say the development raises broader safety and ethical considerations.
